heading: The printer is detected but is not recognized correctly

relations.evidence: IoT --> Devices

Most Epson printers support printing receipts in Odoo Point of Sale using the `GS v 0` command.
However, the following Epson printer models do not support this command: TM-U220
TM-U230
TM-P60
TM-P60II
To bypass this issue, you can configure the printer to use the `ESC *` command.
Access the IoT box's homepage. Click the Printer server button, then click Administration on the CUPS page. Click Add Printer

Printer server to open the OpenPrinting CUPS console.

update the Name to something easily identifiable.

click the newly installed printer DYMO LabelWriter 450 DUO Label from the list.

select Print Test Page to print a test label.
Print Test Page to print a test label. The test label should print out immediately.

heading: The characters read by the barcode scanner do not match the barcode

relations.evidence: By default, most barcode scanners are configured in the US QWERTY format.
go to IoT --> Devices
click the barcode device's card
Then, select the correct language in the Keyboard Layout field.
The Keyboard Layout is language-specific, with available options varying based on the language of the database
If the barcode scanner uses a different layout, go to IoT --> Devices ... Then, select the correct language in the Keyboard Layout field.
